raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-commitment to epistemic humility regarding emotional data",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "feelings constitute veridical information about internal state",
    "feelings can systematically misrepresent external facts",
    "the speaker possesses or can cultivate the capacity to distinguish the two"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; distinguishes source and accuracy of information without denying either",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker has history of treating feelings as direct world-reports and benefits from explicit decoupling",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "used to dismiss feelings that do accurately track external conditions or to avoid appropriate action"
}
